errors.INSTALLER_NOT_FOUND: BMad installer not found. Please run `npx bmad-method install` manually.
errors.INSTALLER_TIMEOUT: BMad installer timed out. Try again or run it manually.
errors.INSTALLER_ALREADY_RUNNING: An installer is already running for this project. Wait for it to finish or cancel it first.
errors.NPX_NOT_AVAILABLE: `npx` is not available on PATH. Install Node.js 20+ to continue.
errors.PROJECT_NOT_BMAD: This is not a BMad project. Run the install wizard to set it up.
errors.PROJECT_NOT_FOUND: Project not found at the given path.
errors.CSV_PARSE_ERROR: Could not parse a BMad CSV file: {{message}}
errors.TOML_PARSE_ERROR: Could not parse a TOML file: {{message}}
errors.YAML_PARSE_ERROR: Could not parse a YAML file: {{message}}
errors.SKILL_NOT_FOUND: Skill `{{skillId}}` is not installed in this project.
errors.STEP_FILE_NOT_FOUND: Step file is missing on disk: {{path}}
errors.STEP_LOAD_VIOLATION: Step files must be loaded one at a time. Refusing to pre-load.
errors.PATH_OUT_OF_PROJECT: The requested path is outside this BMad project.
errors.WATCHER_INIT_FAILED: Could not start the BMad file watcher: {{message}}
errors.WATCHER_NOT_RUNNING: The BMad file watcher is not running for this project.
errors.PROVIDER_ERROR: AI provider could not be initialized: {{message}}
errors.UNSUPPORTED_TRACK: This track isn't supported yet. Pick BMad Method or Enterprise.
errors.CYCLIC_VARIABLE: A variable in your config references itself in a loop: {{message}}
errors.SPRINT_STATUS_NOT_FOUND: Sprint status file doesn't exist yet. Run `bmad-sprint-planning` first.
errors.WORKFLOW_MAX_TURNS: Workflow stopped — too many turns without finishing. Try splitting it into smaller steps.
errors.PERSONA_NOT_FOUND: Persona `{{slug}}` isn't available in this project. The BMM module may not be installed.
errors.MIGRATION_NOT_FOUND: No legacy Aperant specs were found to migrate.
errors.MIGRATION_BACKUP_FAILED: Could not back up legacy specs before migration: {{message}}
errors.MIGRATION_WRITE_FAILED: Could not write migrated BMad artifacts: {{message}}

dumpSkills.emptyState: No BMad skills detected. Run the installer first.

workflow.maxTurns: Workflow reached the maximum number of turns. Pick up from where it left off.

kanban.retrospectiveDescription: Optional epic retrospective. Click Run to launch bmad-retrospective.

empty.backlog: No stories in backlog. Run sprint-planning to populate.
empty.ready-for-dev: Drop stories here when they're ready for development.
empty.in-progress: Drag a story here to mark it in progress.
empty.review: Stories awaiting code review land here.

kanban.storyFileMissing: No story file on disk yet. Run bmad-create-story to generate one.

chat.emptyState: Start a workflow or talk to a persona to begin a conversation.
chat.noActiveProfile: Pick an active Claude profile in Settings to start a workflow.
chat.personaPickerAriaLabel: Choose persona for the next chat

help.noNextRequired: No required action — you can move on or pick something from Recommended.
help.trackComplete: All phases done. Time for a retrospective!
help.askPlaceholderHint: Examples: "What's my next step?" or "How do I customize Mary?"
help.empty: No recommendations yet. Install BMad first.

personaSwitcher.label: Talk to a persona
personaSwitcher.noPersonas: No BMM personas installed in this project.

installWizard.title: Install BMad in this project
installWizard.subtitle: Pick the modules you want and run npx bmad-method install.
installWizard.moduleSectionHelp: BMM is required. Add other modules to get more skills + agents.
installWizard.tracksHelp: Pick a track. You can change it later in Settings.

moduleNames.bmm: BMM — BMad Method (PM, Architect, Dev, etc.)

moduleDescriptions.core: Help, brainstorming, party mode, document utilities. Always installed.
moduleDescriptions.bmm: Mary, Paige, John, Sally, Winston, Amelia and the full Method workflows.
moduleDescriptions.cis: Test Engineer Agent, deep adversarial reviews, edge-case hunters.
moduleDescriptions.rgm: Game design module — narrative + game-mechanics workflows.

installWizard.logEmptyState: Installer output will appear here as the install runs.
installWizard.promptToInstall: This project doesn't have BMad installed.
installWizard.promptToInstallHelp: Run the install wizard to set it up. Existing files in your project are not modified outside the _bmad/ tree.

tutorial.title: Welcome to BMad Studio
tutorial.step1Description: BMad-Help inspects your project and recommends the next required workflow. It's always one click away.
tutorial.step2Description: Mary, John, Winston, Sally, Paige, and Amelia each own different phases of the BMad lifecycle. Switch personas to see who's speaking.
tutorial.step3Description: Sprint status updates flow back to the YAML file via the watcher. Drag-drop is the same as editing the file by hand.

customization.title: Customization editor
customization.description: Write sparse `_bmad/custom/*.toml` overrides and preview the merged result.
customization.skillsHelp: Pick a skill or central config.
customization.multilineHint: One fact per line. The resolver appends these to the shipped defaults.

moduleManager.title: Module manager
moduleManager.description: Install, update, or remove BMad modules through the canonical installer.
moduleManager.empty: No modules found. Run the BMad install wizard first.
moduleManager.installHelp: Select official modules and optionally add Git URLs or local paths.

migration.title: Migrate legacy Aperant specs?
migration.description: Found {{count}} `.auto-claude/specs` folder(s). BMad Studio can back them up and seed `_bmad-output/` artifacts.
